items.body_excerpt: Some call it fate, others call it Naz Reid. Certainly must be the best farm system in the league for other franchises rings, right?

items.title: Andrew Wiggins declining his player option and re-signing on a long-term deal at a lower starting salary could create enough apron space to re-sign Norman Powell.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Andrew Wiggins declining his player option and re-signing on a long-term deal at a lower starting salary could create enough apron space to re-sign Norman Powell.

But after seeing some of today's trades and contracts, Wiggins' market could be too strong for that to be feasible.

items.title: In the summer of 2018, the narrative spread about how soft KAT and Andrew Wiggins were after Jimmy Butler went to the media calling them out when he beat them with third-stringers during practice…
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
In the summer of 2018, the narrative spread about how soft KAT and Andrew Wiggins were after Jimmy Butler went to the media calling them out when he beat them with third-stringers during practice…

Wiggins won it all in 2022 and KAT is now 2 WINS away from a championship.

🤷‍♂️

#NBA
